message.content:
Compare the NEW screens added in card-place branch feature/SPMAIS-32275_ with what exists in rewardprogram.

In card-place (/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place), read these new files:
1. src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx
2. src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx
3. src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts
4. src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts

5. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx
6. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx
7. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts

8. src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/index.ts
9. src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/view.tsx
10. src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/Models/index.ts
11. src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/utils.ts
12. src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/data/index.ts

In rewardprogram (/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram), check if corresponding screens exist:
- Use `find src/screens -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts"` to list all screen files
- Read any matching screens to compare

Provide a detailed comparison:
- Files that exist in both repos
- Files missing in rewardprogram
- Key differences in implementation (imports, logic, structure)

content.text: I'll analyze the new screens in the card-place branch and compare them with what exists in the rewardprogram repository. Let me start by reading the files from card-place and then checking the rewardprogram.

content.content:
1→import { Box, Text, TagLabel, Button, BackDropBottom, SeparatorHorizontal, CardActivity, DetailTransactionValue, Alert } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     2→import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
     3→import React, { FC } from 'react';
     4→import { Linking, ActivityIndicator } from 'react-native';
     5→import theme from '../../styles/theme';
     6→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
     7→import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
     8→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
     9→import { MyOrdersDetailProps, STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
    10→
    11→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
    12→  handleGoBack,
    13→  transaction,
    14→  modalizeRef,
    15→  modalizeRefInfo,
    16→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    17→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    18→  handleOpenInfo,
    19→  handleCloseInfo,
    20→  isLoading,
    21→  hasError,
    22→  handleRetry,
    23→  isCashback,
    24→  cardTitle,
    25→  formattedPointsValue,
    26→  highlightText,
    27→  formattedCurrencyValue,
    28→  marketplaceContent,
    29→  showOrderNumber,
    30→  showStatus,
    31→  showValue,
    32→  height,
    33→}) => {
    34→
    35→  if (hasError) {
    36→    return (
    37→      <BasicScreen
    38→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    39→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    40→        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    41→      >
    42→        <ApiError
    43→          title="Algo deu errado!"
    44→          subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
    45→          isLoading={isLoading}
    46→          onPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    47→        />
    48→      </BasicScreen>
    49→    );
    50→  }
    51→
    52→  if (isLoading && !transaction) {
    53→    return (
    54→      <BasicScreen
    55→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    56→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    57→        hasScroll
    58→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    59→      >
    60→        <Box flex={1} justify="center" align="center" minHeight={400}>
    61→          <ActivityIndicator size="large" color={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01} />
    62→        </Box>
    63→      </BasicScreen>
    64→    );
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  if (!transaction) {
    68→    return null;
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  const renderDivider = () => {
    72→    return (
    73→      <SeparatorHorizontal
    74→        borderWidth="smaller"
    75→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    76→        height={1}
    77→        width="100%"
    78→        mt="xxxxs"
    79→      />
    80→    );
    81→  };
    82→
    83→  const renderMarketplaceContent = () => {
    84→    if (!marketplaceContent) return null;
    85→
    86→    return (
    87→      <>
    88→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    89→          Número do pedido
    90→        </Text>
    91→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    92→          #{marketplaceContent.orderNumber}
    93→        </Text>
    94→        {marketplaceContent.status && (
    95→          <>
    96→            {renderDivider()}
    97→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    98→              Status do pedido
    99→            </Text>
   100→            <TagLabel
   101→              type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any) || 'neutral'}
   102→              text={marketplaceContent.status}
   103→              showSpacing
   104→            />
   105→          </>
   106→        )}
   107→        {marketplaceContent.paymentType && (
   108→          <>
   109→            {renderDivider()}
   110→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   111→              Forma de pagamento
   112→            </Text>
   113→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   114→              {marketplaceContent.paymentType}
   115→            </Text>
   116→          </>
   117→        )}
   118→        {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== undefined && marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== null && (
   119→          <>
   120→            {renderDivider()}
   121→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   122→              Frete
   123→            </Text>
   124→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   125→              {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints}
   126→            </Text>
   127→          </>
   128→        )}
   129→        {marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== undefined && marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== null && (
   130→          <>
   131→            {renderDivider()}
   132→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   133→              Valor total
   134→            </Text>
   135→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   136→              {marketplaceContent.valuePoints}
   137→            </Text>
   138→          </>
   139→        )}
   140→        {marketplaceContent.vendorName && (
   141→          <>
   142→            {renderDivider()}
   143→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   144→              Parceiro: {marketplaceContent.vendorName}
   145→            </Text>
   146→          </>
   147→        )}
   148→        {marketplaceContent.items.map((item, itemIndex: number) => (
   149→          <CardActivity
   150→            key={itemIndex}
   151→            mt={"nano"}
   152→            title={item.name}
   153→            titleTextType="paragraphMD"
   154→            description={`Quantidade: ${item.quantity}\nValor: ${item.valuePoints}`}
   155→            descriptionTextType="paragraphSM"
   156→            showImage={!!item.cleanedImageUrl}
   157→            image={item.cleanedImageUrl ? { uri: item.cleanedImageUrl } : undefined}
   158→            showIcon={false}
   159→            iconRight={null as any}
   160→            hideBorder={false}
   161→          />
   162→        ))}
   163→
   164→        <Alert
   165→          title='Detalhes da entrega'
   166→          mt="meddium"
   167→          label="Você pode acompanhar a entrega do seu pedido pelo site do parceiro."
   168→          numberOfLines={2}
   169→          type="highlight"
   170→          icon="icon-truck"
   171→          hasIconBackground
   172→          bgIconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   173→        />
   174→      </>
   175→    );
   176→  };
   177→
   178→  return (
   179→    <>
   180→      <BasicScreen
   181→        title={'Detalhes do pedido'}
   182→        isLoading={isLoading}
   183→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   184→        rightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace ? "icon-help" : undefined}
   185→        rightIconOnPress={undefined}
   186→        hasRightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace}
   187→        hasScroll
   188→        errorButtonOnPress={() => { }}
   189→      >
   190→      <DetailTransactionValue
   191→          icon={transaction.icon as any}
   192→          title={cardTitle}
   193→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   194→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   195→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   196→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   197→          pointsColor={(transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED') ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02' : 'INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const}
   198→        />
   199→
   200→        <Box ml='smaller' mr='smaller' mt='xs' flex={1}>
   201→
   202→          <TagLabel
   203→            icon={undefined}
   204→            type="neutral"
   205→            text={highlightText}
   206→            showSpacing
   207→            mb='xs'
   208→          />
   209→
   210→          <Box flex={1} width="100%">
   211→            {showOrderNumber && (
   212→              <>
   213→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   214→                  Número do pedido
   215→                </Text>
   216→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   217→                  #{transaction.id}
   218→                </Text>
   219→              </>
   220→            )}
   221→
   222→            {showStatus && transaction.status && (
   223→              <>
   224→                {renderDivider()}
   225→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   226→                  Status do pedido
   227→                </Text>
   228→                <TagLabel
   229→                  type={STATUS_COLORS[transaction.status] || 'neutral'}
   230→                  text={transaction.status}
   231→                  showSpacing
   232→                />
   233→              </>
   234→            )}
   235→
   236→            {showValue && (
   237→              <>
   238→                {renderDivider()}
   239→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   240→                  Valor
   241→                </Text>
   242→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   243→                  {formattedCurrencyValue}
   244→                </Text>
   245→              </>
   246→            )}
   247→
   248→            {marketplaceContent && renderMarketplaceContent()}
   249→          </Box>
   250→
   251→
   252→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   253→            <Button
   254→              type="ghostLarge"
   255→              text="Relatar Problema"
   256→              onPress={handleOpenReportProblem}
   257→            />
   258→          </Box>
   259→        </Box>
   260→
   261→      </BasicScreen>
   262→
   263→      <BackDropBottom
   264→        modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}
   265→      >
   266→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   267→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   268→            <Text type="paragraphXXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xs" align="center">
   269→              Central de Atendimento
   270→            </Text>
   271→          </Box>
   272→        </Box>
   273→
   274→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   275→          <CardActivity
   276→            mt="nano"
   277→            icon="icon-contact"
   278→            title="Capitais"
   279→            description="4002 1552"
   280→            iconRight="icon-next"
   281→            showIcon
   282→            showTagLabel={false}
   283→            onPress={() => {
   284→              eventSelectContent({
   285→                content_type: 'cta',
   286→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   287→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   288→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   289→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   290→              });
   291→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   292→            }}
   293→          />
   294→
   295→          <CardActivity
   296→            mt="nano"
   297→            icon="icon-contact"
   298→            title="Demais localidades"
   299→            description="0800 015 0252"
   300→            iconRight="icon-next"
   301→            showIcon
   302→            showTagLabel={false}
   303→            onPress={() => {
   304→              eventSelectContent({
   305→                content_type: 'cta',
   306→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   307→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   308→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   309→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   310→              });
   311→
   312→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   313→            }}
   314→          />
   315→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt='xxxxs'>
   316→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das 9h às 17h.
   317→          </Text>
   318→
   319→
   320→        </Box>
   321→
   322→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt='xxxxs'>
   323→          <Text type="linkMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_05" onPress={handleCloseReportProblem} align="center">
   324→            Fechar
   325→          </Text>
   326→        </Box>
   327→      </BackDropBottom>
   328→
   329→      {isCashback && (
   330→        <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.30} modalizeRef={modalizeRefInfo as PropsModalizeRef}>
   331→          <Text
   332→            type="paragraphMD"
   333→            align="center"
   334→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   335→            mt="small"
   336→            mb="smaller"
   337→          >
   338→            Você também pode conferir o valor do desconto nos lançamentos da sua fatura.
   339→          </Text>
   340→
   341→          <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleCloseInfo} />
   342→        </BackDropBottom>
   343→      )}
   344→    </>
   345→  );
   346→};
   347→
   348→export default MyOrdersDetailView;
   349→
   350→

<system-reminder>

    29→    location_3: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
    30→  },
    31→  FILTER: {
    32→    content_id: 'filtro_extrato_hub',
    33→    location_1: 'monetizacao',
    34→    location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
    35→    location_3: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
    36→  },
    37→  TRANSACTION_DETAIL: {
    38→    content_type: 'cta',
    39→    content_id: 'detalhe_ponto',
    40→    location_1: 'monetizacao',
    41→    location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
    42→    location_3: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
    43→  },
    44→} as const;

content.content:
1→import {
     2→  Alert,
     3→  BackDropBottom,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  CardActivity,
     7→  DetailTransactionValue,
     8→  SeparatorHorizontal,
     9→  TagLabel,
    10→  Text,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import type { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
    13→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    14→import { ActivityIndicator, Linking } from 'react-native';
    15→import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
    16→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    17→import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
    18→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    19→import type { MyOrdersDetailProps } from './Models';
    20→import { STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
    21→
    22→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
    23→  handleGoBack,
    24→  transaction,
    25→  modalizeRef,
    26→  modalizeRefInfo,
    27→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    28→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    29→  handleOpenInfo: _handleOpenInfo,
    30→  handleCloseInfo,
    31→  isLoading,
    32→  hasError,
    33→  handleRetry,
    34→  isCashback,
    35→  cardTitle,
    36→  formattedPointsValue,
    37→  highlightText,
    38→  formattedCurrencyValue,
    39→  marketplaceContent,
    40→  showOrderNumber,
    41→  showStatus,
    42→  showValue,
    43→  height,
    44→}) => {
    45→  if (hasError) {
    46→    return (
    47→      <BasicScreen
    48→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    49→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    50→        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    51→      >
    52→        <ApiError
    53→          title="Algo deu errado!"
    54→          subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
    55→          isLoading={isLoading}
    56→          onPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    57→        />
    58→      </BasicScreen>

    95→      <>
    96→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    97→          Número do pedido
    98→        </Text>
    99→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   100→          #{marketplaceContent.orderNumber}

   273→        <Box pd="innerSmall">

   330→
   331→      {isCashback && (

   347→  );
   348→};
   349→
   350→export default MyOrdersDetailView;

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information I need to provide a comprehensive comparison. Let me compile the analysis.

## Detailed Comparison: card-place NEW Screens vs rewardprogram

### Overview
All three screen suites exist in both repositories with the same structure. The screens are nearly identical, with differences primarily in import paths and type handling.

---

## 1. MyOrdersDetails Screen Suite

### Files Comparison

**Status: Files exist in both repos**

| Aspect | Card-Place | RewardProgram |
|--------|-----------|--------------|
| File count | 4 files | 4 files |
| Structure | Same | Same |

### Import Path Differences

**card-place:**
```typescript
import { useRootStore } from '../../store';
import { OrderDetailStatus, TransactionType } from '../../store/rewardProgram/models';
import { getOrderDetail } from '../../store/rewardProgram/services';
import type { ScreenProps } from '../../routes/Models';
```

**rewardprogram:**
```typescript
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { OrderDetailStatus, type TransactionType } from '../../services/models';
import { getOrderDetail } from '../../services/services';
import type { ScreenProps } from '../../routes/Models';
```

### Key Differences

#### index.tsx
1. **Component structure:**
   - Card-place: Uses full FC type `FC<ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>>`
   - RewardProgram: Uses simplified type with destructured route `({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>)`
   
2. **useMemo optimization:**
   - Card-place: Inline enrichedTransaction without useMemo wrapper
   - RewardProgram: Wraps enrichedTransaction in useMemo with explicit dependency array

3. **Card-place line 124-134:**
   ```typescript
   const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
     ...transaction,
   ```
   
   **RewardProgram line 124-142:**
   ```typescript
   const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
     if (!transaction) return undefined;
     return {
   ```

#### view.tsx
1. **Type casting:**
   - Card-place: `type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any) || 'neutral'}`
   - RewardProgram: `type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never) || 'neutral'}`

2. **Theme import:**
   - Card-place: `import theme from '../../styles/theme';`
   - RewardProgram: `import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';`

3. **View destructuring:**
   - Card-place: Destructures `handleOpenInfo` directly
   - RewardProgram: Destructures as `handleOpenInfo: _handleOpenInfo` (unused)

#### Models/index.ts
1. **Type references:**
   - Card-place: `import type { PointsTransaction } from '../../../store/rewardProgram/models';`
   - RewardProgram: `import type { PointsTransaction } from '../../../services/models';`

2. **MarketplaceItemData interface:**
   - Card-place: `valuePoints: number;`
   - RewardProgram: `valuePoints: number | string;` (more permissive)

3. **MarketplaceContentData interface:**
   - Card-place: Uses number types
   - RewardProgram: `number | string` for valuePoints and shippingValuePoints

#### utils.ts
1. **moment parameter:**
   - Card-place: `getFormattedHighlightText(date: string, gainType: TransactionGainType, moment: any)`
   - RewardProgram: `getFormattedHighlightText(date: string, _gainType: TransactionGainType, momentInstance: typeof moment)`
   - RewardProgram ignores gainType parameter (prefixed with underscore) and uses typeof

---

## 2. MyOrdersRewardProgram (MyOrdersCashback) Screen

### Files Comparison

**Status: Files exist in both repos** (screen renamed from MyOrdersCashback to MyOrdersRewardProgram in card-place)

| Aspect | Card-Place | RewardProgram |
|--------|-----------|--------------|
| Screen name | MyOrdersRewardProgram | MyOrdersCashback |
| File count | 3 files | 3 files |

### Import Path Differences

**card-place (MyOrdersRewardProgram):**
```typescript
import { useRootStore } from '../../store';
import { PointsExtractStatus } from '../../store/rewardProgram/models';
import { getPointsExtract } from '../../store/rewardProgram/services';
```

**rewardprogram (MyOrdersCashback):**
```typescript
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PointsExtractStatus } from '../../services/models';
import { getPointsExtract } from '../../services/services';
```

### Key Differences

#### index.tsx
1. **Navigation import:**
   - Card-place: Uses PropsRootStack imported from src
   - RewardProgram: Uses PropsRootStack from src/routes/Models

2. **Cardinal amount handling:**
   - Card-place (line 93): `titleDescription={String(item.amount)}`
   - RewardProgram (line 97): `titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}`
   - RewardProgram applies Math.abs for display

#### view.tsx
1. **Theme import path:**
   - Card-place: `import theme from '../../styles/theme';`
   - RewardProgram: `import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';`

2. **Empty state styling:**
   - Card-place: Minimal styling
   - RewardProgram (line 113): Adds `pd="innerLarger"` padding
   - RewardProgram (line 116-117): Uses ts-ignore comment for source prop

3. **Component import structure:**
   - Card-place: Single import statement
   - RewardProgram: Named imports with consistent formatting

#### models/index.ts
1. **Type exports:**
   - Card-place: `export { PointsTransaction } from "src/store/rewardProgram";`
   - RewardProgram: No re-export, imports directly from services

2. **Interface definitions:**
   - Card-place: `MyOrdersItem` interface (unused)
   - RewardProgram: Removes MyOrdersItem, uses PointsTransaction directly

3. **Status color mapping:**
   - Identical STATUS_COLORS object in both

---

## 3. ExtractRewardProgram Screen Suite

### Files Comparison

**Status: Files exist in both repos**

| Aspect | Card-Place | RewardProgram |
|--------|-----------|--------------|
| File count | 5 files (+ data/index.ts) | 5 files (+ data/index.ts) |
| Structure | Same | Same |

### Import Path Differences

**card-place:**
```typescript
import { getPointsExtract, getPointsBalance } from '../../store/rewardProgram/services';
import {
  PointsExtractStatus,
  PointsBalanceStatus,
  type AppliedFilters,
  type PointsTransaction,
} from '../../store/rewardProgram/models';
```

**rewardprogram:**
```typescript
import {
  getPointsBalance,
  getPointsExtract,
  PERIOD_DAYS_MAP,
  PointsBalanceStatus,
  PointsExtractStatus,
  processPointsExtractData,
  type AppliedFilters,
  type PointsTransaction,
} from '../../services';
```

### Key Differences

#### index.ts (Logic Hook)
1. **Error handling:**
   - Card-place (line 79-83): Returns empty hasError
   ```typescript
   hasError: false,
   ```
   
   - RewardProgram (line 79-83): Full error logic
   ```typescript
   hasError:
     pointsExtract.status === PointsExtractStatus.ERROR &&
     !isLoadingExtract &&
     (!pointsExtract.extractData ||
       !pointsExtract.extractData.transactions?.length),
   ```

2. **Focus effect refresh:**
   - Card-place: No refresh on focus after initial load
   - RewardProgram (line 107-119): Includes `refreshExtractData()` on screen focus
   ```typescript
   useFocusEffect(
     useCallback(() => {
       refreshExtractData();
     }, [refreshExtractData]),
   );
   ```

3. **handleRefresh enhancement:**
   - Card-place (line 251-254): Basic refresh
   - RewardProgram (line 322-330): Resets status flags + fetches balance
   ```typescript
   const handleRefresh = useCallback(() => {
     setIsRefreshing(true);
     pointsExtractActions.setBalanceStatus(PointsBalanceStatus.IDLE);
     getPointsBalance();
     requestPointsExtract();
   }, [...]);
   ```

4. **getPlaceholder export:**
   - Card-place: Not explicitly imported in view
   - RewardProgram: Direct import for getPlaceholder usage

#### view.tsx
1. **Points display:**
   - Card-place (line 130-132):
   ```typescript
   valuePoints={
     pointsAvailable ? pointsAvailable.toLocaleString('pt-br') : '0'
   }
   ```
   
   - RewardProgram (line 140-142):
   ```typescript
   valuePoints={
     pointsAvailable
       ? Math.floor(pointsAvailable).toLocaleString('pt-br')
       : '0'
   }
   ```
   - RewardProgram adds Math.floor for integer display

2. **Loading indicator:**
   - Card-place (line 55-61): Uses ActivityIndicator with theme
   - RewardProgram (line 61-65): Uses LoadingFooter component from design system

#### Models/index.ts
1. **Type exports:**
   - Card-place: Re-exports TYPE_LABELS and PERIOD_DAYS_MAP from models
   - RewardProgram: Doesn't re-export (uses direct imports from services)

2. **ExtractRewardProgramProps:**
   - Card-place (line 67-74): Custom interface with optional navigation
   - RewardProgram (line 61-64): Uses NativeStackScreenProps with route typing

3. **Screen props typing:**
   - Card-place: Manual type definition
   - RewardProgram: Leverages NativeStackScreenProps from navigation

#### utils.ts
1. **Type matching:**
   - Card-place (line 24): Basic set.has() check
   ```typescript
   return typesSet.has(transactionType);
   ```
   
   - RewardProgram (line 26): Uppercase normalization
   ```typescript
   return typesSet.has(transactionType.toUpperCase());
   ```

2. **Type set creation:**
   - RewardProgram (line 55): Explicitly maps to uppercase
   ```typescript
   ? new Set(filters.types!.map(type => type.toUpperCase()))
   ```

#### data/index.ts
- **Identical:** Both repos have identical SCREEN_STRINGS and ANALYTICS_EVENTS

---

## Summary Table

| Category | Status |
|----------|--------|
| **MyOrdersDetails** | All files exist; minor differences in imports & type handling |
| **MyOrdersRewardProgram** | All files exist; screen renamed, Math.abs on amounts, padding in empty state |
| **ExtractRewardProgram** | All files exist; significant logic differences in error handling, focus refresh, & points display |

### Critical Differences to Address
1. **Import paths:** Card-place uses `store/rewardProgram/*` while rewardprogram uses `services/*` 
2. **Error handling:** RewardProgram has more sophisticated error state logic
3. **Refresh lifecycle:** RewardProgram refreshes data on screen focus, card-place doesn't
4. **Type safety:** RewardProgram includes case normalization in filter logic
5. **UI display:** RewardProgram floors points, applies Math.abs to amounts, adds padding
6. **Component usage:** RewardProgram uses LoadingFooter instead of ActivityIndicator
